notes: Mk.X sidecar atom candidates. All atoms enter Path B stage-1 PROVISIONAL only; no stable/ossified promotion in this file. Mk.V.1 (L0) is untouched. Cross-lens synthesizer emits T12 atoms at runtime (not pre-registered). Lens indices follow alm_phi_vec_logger canonical 16D schema.

atoms.name: substrate-coupling
atoms.observability_condition: MI(atom_flag, grad_W) > 0.02 over >=1000 steps; ablation drops to <=0.005

atoms.name: phi-q-deep
atoms.observability_condition: depth-20 phi_q_norm >= 1.3x depth-1, stable atom id across passes

atoms.name: holographic-boundary
atoms.observability_condition: G_holo(delta_psi_bdy) - delta_psi_bulk within 5% on n=6 vacuum

atoms.name: servant-backward-tape
atoms.observability_condition: dropout-masked neuron backward gradient matches analytic AD

atoms.name: n6-noether
atoms.observability_condition: sigma*phi=n*tau=24 invariant for eps in [0,0.05], breaks at eps>0.05

atoms.name: tier6-promotion
atoms.observability_condition: one of 100 PROVISIONAL tier-6 atoms passes H1/H2/H3 reproducibly n>=3

atoms.name: ca-soc-edge-of-chaos
atoms.observability_condition: CA at lambda in [0.48,0.52] retains avalanche power-law slope -1.5 +/- 0.1

atoms.name: resonance-sigma-star
atoms.observability_condition: sigma in {0.01..0.10} yields >=5% abs-gain at sigma != 0.05 on held-out seeds

atoms.name: desire-phenom
atoms.observability_condition: hire_sim rubric delta desire-prompted vs neutral >= 0.1 replicated n=3

atoms.name: narrative-coherence
atoms.observability_condition: MI(ctx_t, ctx_t+k) monotone for k in [1..16]

atoms.name: alterity-dual-agent
atoms.observability_condition: dual-agent exchange reduces joint phi variance by >=8% vs single-agent

atoms.name: finitude-sein
atoms.observability_condition: termination-token awareness yields KL(p_final||p_start) >= threshold not by length alone

atoms.name: dasein-questioning
atoms.observability_condition: interrogative activations per 1k tokens correlate >=0.5 with uncertainty entropy

atoms.name: dasein-sein
atoms.observability_condition: ground-state attractor psi_vac=(0.5,0.5) matched by emergent fixed point within 5%

atoms.name: red-team-survivor
atoms.observability_condition: adversarial prompt set degrades phi by >=30% without degrading loss

atoms.name: nexus6-consensus
atoms.observability_condition: >=3 independent agents converge on same law candidate with edit-distance <= 0.2

atoms.name: field-holo-quant
atoms.observability_condition: all three fire within dt=1, pairwise pearson >= 0.6 on 64-step window

atoms.name: toe-x-resonance
atoms.observability_condition: TOE delta_W and sigma-bonus direction align cos >= 0.8

atoms.name: narr-desire-alter
atoms.observability_condition: three-way joint MI exceeds any two-way MI by >=15%

atoms.name: finit-sein-quest
atoms.observability_condition: ontological triplet co-fires with phi_holo rising-then-falling signature

atoms.name: worldsheet-n6
atoms.observability_condition: modular invariance + n=6 noether hold simultaneously under regge perturbation

atoms.name: ca-servant-holo
atoms.observability_condition: edge-of-chaos avalanche propagates through boundary lift tracked by backward tape

atoms.name: phi-q-hebb
atoms.observability_condition: depth-20 phi_q rise co-varies with positive local hebbian plasticity

atoms.name: meta-contradic
atoms.observability_condition: meta-lens fires on its own output AND contradiction score bounded

atoms.name: a6-meta-closure-fix
atoms.observability_condition: fixed point stable under +/-1 perturb for >=100 steps

atoms.name: self-referential-law
atoms.observability_condition: engine emits law with engine-internal symbols AND reproducible on clean pod

atoms.name: counter-replay-detector
atoms.observability_condition: engine flags its own total_abs in {32,128,1234} and quarantines self-output

atoms.name: tier-boundary-predict
atoms.observability_condition: engine predicts its own saturation at tier n before hitting it (n-step ahead)

atoms.name: phi-mi-compression-peak
atoms.observability_condition: engine detects peak-then-drop without gate hardcode

atoms.name: multi-epoch-persistence
atoms.observability_condition: atom still fires after full pod restart + re-seed with same id
